title: AV:Link Avlink 113.005UK 5 m USB A Plug to USB A Socket Extension Lead Cable
features: Transfer data from one device to another
description: Product Description 5 metres Avlink USB A Plug to USB A socket lead. Extends your USB signal between devices. Cable diameter - 4.3mm. Length - 5.0m. Cable specification - 4x0.15mm CCA + 32x0.10 CCA Braid, Cotton, Reinforced. Box Contains Cable
